title: ilex ledermannii
intro: Ilex ledermannii, also known as the Dorrigo holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex ledermannii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Ilex ledermannii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in traditional and modern medicine.
